name: Andersonville Bus Lines
fleet_size_est: ~7-15 buses (small contractor; lost 6-7 Anderson Co routes in 2024)
districts_or_customers: Anderson County Schools (TN) - lost 7 routes to SCU in 2024 bid
recent_news: 2024: Lost bid protest after Anderson County awarded 7 routes to lower bidder SCU, saving county ~$172K; Landreth disputed evaluation criteria.
fit_notes: Small family-owned single-county contractor under competitive pressure (recently lost routes to lower bidder). Marginal tuck-in - small scale and contract risk - but potential bolt-on if Summit pursues TN footprint; owner may be receptive given recent contract losses.

name: Drivergent
districts_or_customers: Public, charter, and private schools across Metro Detroit (Wayne, Oakland, Macomb, Genesee, Lapeer, Livingston, Monroe, St. Clair, Washtenaw counties)
recent_news: Founded 2019; positions as innovator addressing MI school district driver shortages with bus routes plus driver-staffing/management services. No M&A activity identified.
fit_notes: Young (2019) Metro Detroit startup with driver-staffing angle - small but in a state where Summit/Durham has presence. Likely too small/early-stage for typical tuck-in; founder unlikely seeking exit. Better as talent/tech learning than acquisition.

name: Swart School Buses
principals: Esther Swart (historical owner of related Mildon Bus Lines)
districts_or_customers: Western PA - West Alexander/Donegal area (Donegal SD itself contracts with Durham/Summit, so likely serves adjacent districts)
recent_news: BBB shows affiliated entity Mildon Bus Lines Inc (alt name Swart School Buses) at 65 Church St West Alexander PA, started 1946, incorporated 1983, listed as 'out of business' on BBB - status of Swart School Buses operation under Richard Swart is unclear and may be successor/related entity.
fit_notes: Aging multi-generational family operation (Esther/Richard Swart) tied to 1946-founded Mildon Bus Lines, with BBB flagging affiliated entity as out-of-business. High succession signal but operational status needs verification before outreach. Note address mismatch (record source shows West Alexander, PA, not Donegal).

name: Wheelchair Taxi By Yellow Cab
owner_or_parent: Yellow Cab of Broward (parent taxi operator; not a school-bus contractor)
districts_or_customers: Broward County general public; ADA/disabled riders; not a school district contractor
recent_news: Wheelchair Taxi is a service line (dispatch line 954-565-2800) of Yellow Cab of Broward, founded 1960. Yellow Cab Broward was NOT part of Transdev's 2014 PTG/Florida taxi acquisition. Independent local taxi operator.
fit_notes: NOT a fit - this is a taxicab/wheelchair-accessible taxi business under Yellow Cab Broward, not an independent student-transportation contractor. Should be removed from target list. No school district contracts identified.

name: Terry's Transportation Co Inc
districts_or_customers: Brooklyn-based; likely NYC Medicaid/MTA Access-A-Ride paratransit and ambulette work rather than NYCDOE school-bus routes
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Classified as ambulette/medical transport service rather than yellow-bus school contractor; presence on Neptune Ave Coney Island consistent with NEMT/ambulette focus.
fit_notes: Likely ambulette/NEMT operator rather than NYCDOE yellow-bus contractor - questionable fit unless Summit is expanding into NYC SPED/ambulette adjacency. Small scale ($3M rev) but family-owned suggests potential succession candidate; needs primary-source confirmation of school-transport scope before pursuing.
